description: Cooperative yield point at every loop back-edge (SCC-detected, covers mutual recursion). Nearly-free 3-instruction inline check; when GC is needed the process yields to the scheduler, gc_mid_flight runs with the correct root set (mid_flight_roots slab + mailbox items), and the process resumes via a per-function shim. Same mechanism provides soft preemption. See docs/mid-flight-gc.md for full design.
title: fz-sched: mid-flight GC via back-edge cooperative yield
